Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (209 Harvard Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: At 11:02am, Ernest Der appearing for trustee. Counsel wants to continue this sale to allow for re-notice of the sale. Agent for the original bidders objects to the continuance. Court is going forward with the sale this morning. Sale is confirmed at $643,800.00. Additional bond of $615,000.00 is required. Counsel will bring in the bond to get the order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (209 Harvard Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To May-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ernest Der appearing for petitioner. Matter is continued to 5/30. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
